title: psychotria desseinii subsp. minor
intro: Psychotria desseinii subsp. minor, also known as the African bloodroot, is a plant species within the Rubiaceae family, native to tropical Africa. It is valued for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Psychotria desseinii subsp. minor include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain and inflammation, and treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a decoction or infusion for its medicinal use, and modern herbal preparations include capsules and tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential health benefits and optimal preparation methods.
